name: zyntiq_cert
description: Root project manager for Zyntiq Cert

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:network: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client -- --host"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
